# Gradle Wrapper

The `gradle-wrapper.jar` binary is not committed to this repository.

When you open this project in **Android Studio**, it will automatically download the wrapper JAR and set up Gradle. This is the recommended approach.

Alternatively, if you have Gradle installed locally, you can run:

```sh
gradle wrapper --gradle-version 8.6
```

This will generate the `gradle-wrapper.jar` in this directory.
